name: Tuna Loaf (P/c)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Toasted bread crumbs, mixed with 2 tbsp melted butter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except water.
2. Grease a heatproof mold and pack the mixture into it.
3. Pour the water into a cooker and place the mold on a rack in the cooker.
4. Cook under 15 lbs pressure for 30 minutes.
5. Allow the pressure to reduce naturally with cool water.
6. Serves 4.
